name: Sea Buckthorn Oil
description: A nutrient-dense orange oil packed with omega-7, beta-carotene, and vitamins C and E.
scientificSummary: Exceptionally rich in palmitoleic acid (omega-7), tocotrienols, and carotenoids, all of which support skin regeneration.
mechanismOfAction: Palmitoleic acid integrates into skin cell membranes, while carotenoids quench free radicals and stimulate cell turnover.

seo.title: Sea Buckthorn Oil - Healing Botanical Oil | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Sea Buckthorn Oil heals, brightens, and nourishes even the most damaged skin.
